name: Luscious Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small red cabbage, sliced into thin strips
2 and 1/2 cups Granny Smith apples, unpeeled, cubed
recipeInstructions:
Chicken:
1. In a saute pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken and cook, turning occasionally, for about 10 minutes or until chicken is fork tender.
3. Remove the chicken; cool and cut into thin strips.
Luscious Dressing:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a jar with a tight fitting lid.
Assembly:
1. Add dressing and toss lightly.
2. Cover and chill for about 1 hour.
3. Arrange on serving plates; garnish with orange and kiwi slices.
